title: Looking for Category Manager at FurnitureMart

jsonLd.title: Looking for Category Manager at FurnitureMart
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at FurnitureMart. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Category Manager to strengthen our Delhi-based team.

About FurnitureMart:
FurnitureMart is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Data Analytics

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FurnitureMart!
